extDescription.message: The Chrome iOS tab switcher on desktop: a grid of cards with live previews of your tabs.

emptyPrivateTitle.message: Your private tabs will appear here

emptyPrivateSubtitle.message: To browse the web privately, add a tab

emptyPrivateNoAccess.message: First allow the extension in incognito: chrome://extensions → iOS Tab Switcher → Details → “Allow in Incognito”

emptyGroupsTitle.message: Your tab groups will appear here

emptyGroupsSubtitle.message: Group tabs in Chrome (right-click a tab → “Add tab to new group”) or create one with the + button.
